feature.name: Teams Supabase Migration
feature.description: Migrate Teams feature from FileMaker to Supabase-backed architecture with backend API support

standing_constraints: DO NOT directly modify backend infrastructure - create backend change requests instead
All database schema changes require BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST document
Maintain data integrity - no data loss during migration
All operations must be scoped to user's organization
Follow existing project patterns for API/service/hook structure

tasks.title: Create requirements documentation
tasks.description: Document current Teams feature, FileMaker usage, data model, and migration requirements under requirements/teams/

tasks.title: Create backend change request document
tasks.description: Create BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST_002_TEAMS_MIGRATION.md with database schema, API endpoints, authorization requirements, and migration approach

tasks.title: Wait for backend implementation
tasks.description: Backend team implements database schema (teams, staff, team_members tables, projects.team_id column) and API endpoints

tasks.title: Create data migration script
tasks.description: Build script to migrate teams, staff, and team_members data from FileMaker to Supabase, preserving all relationships

tasks.title: Refactor src/api/teams.js
tasks.description: Replace all FileMaker API calls with Backend API endpoints, update error handling to use HTTP patterns

tasks.title: Update src/services/teamService.js
tasks.description: Update data processing functions to handle Backend API response format instead of FileMaker fieldData structure

tasks.title: Verify src/hooks/useTeam.js compatibility
tasks.description: Test and update useTeam hook to ensure it works correctly with new API responses, update state management if needed

tasks.title: Test team components
tasks.description: Verify TeamDetails.jsx and TeamForm.jsx work correctly with new backend, update data format handling if needed

tasks.title: Execute data migration
tasks.description: Run migration script to transfer all team data from FileMaker to Supabase, validate record counts and relationships

tasks.title: Create migration validation script
tasks.description: Build script to compare FileMaker and Supabase data, verify all teams, staff, and memberships migrated correctly

tasks.title: Integration testing
tasks.description: Test complete team workflows: create team, add staff, assign projects, update, delete. Verify all CRUD operations work end-to-end

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md and other docs to reflect Supabase-backed teams implementation, remove FileMaker references from teams section
